title: zosterophyllanthos millei
intro: Zosterophyllanthos millei is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the "Australian coral tree" due to its bright red and yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zosterophyllanthos millei include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
